conditions.name: Servico indisponivel
conditions.description: Readiness inferior a uma replica ou ausencia continua do sinal por cinco minutos.
conditions.query: FROM Metric SELECT min(kube_deployment_status_replicas_ready) WHERE k8s.cluster.name = 'eks-lab' AND k8s.namespace.name = 'default' AND k8s.deployment.name IN ('oficina-os-service', 'oficina-billing-service', 'oficina-execution-service') FACET k8s.deployment.name

conditions.name: Erro HTTP elevado
conditions.description: Mais de cinco respostas HTTP 5xx por servico em cinco minutos.
conditions.query: FROM Log SELECT count(*) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND numeric(http.status) >= 500 FACET service.name

conditions.name: Latencia HTTP p95 elevada
conditions.description: Latencia p95 superior a dois segundos por servico durante cinco minutos.
conditions.query: FROM Span SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 95) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND (span.kind = 'server' OR span.kind = 'SERVER') FACET service.name

conditions.name: Outbox parada
conditions.description: Evento mais antigo pendente na Outbox acima de 300 segundos.
conditions.query: FROM Metric SELECT latest(outbox_oldest_pending_age) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name

conditions.name: Outbox com falha
conditions.description: Qualquer incremento do contador de falhas de publicacao da Outbox.
conditions.query: FROM Metric SELECT sum(outbox_failed_count_total) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, eventType, topic

conditions.name: DLQ recebendo mensagens
conditions.description: Qualquer incremento do contador de mensagens encaminhadas para DLQ.
conditions.query: FROM Metric SELECT sum(messaging_dlq_count_total) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' FACET service.name, queue, topic

conditions.name: Saga em falha manual
conditions.query: FROM Metric SELECT sum(saga_instances_failed_count_total) WHERE service = 'oficina-os-service' AND sagaType = 'ordemServico' FACET reason

conditions.name: Pagamento indisponivel
conditions.description: Duas ou mais falhas de indisponibilidade do Mercado Pago na janela avaliada.
conditions.query: FROM Metric SELECT sum(payment_provider_unavailable_count_total) WHERE service = 'oficina-billing-service' AND provider = 'mercado-pago' FACET reason

conditions.name: Banco indisponivel
conditions.description: Falha categorizada como indisponibilidade em operacoes PostgreSQL ou DynamoDB.
conditions.query: FROM Metric SELECT sum(persistence_operations_count_total) WHERE service.namespace = 'oficina' AND deployment.environment = 'lab' AND result = 'failure' AND error = 'unavailable' FACET service.name, database, resource
